tool_calls.result_preview: docs/operations.md:3: The incident review process is owned by the reliability engineering team.

# Operations Handbook

The incident review process is owned by the reliability engineering team.

Sev-1 incidents require a first response within 15 minutes.

Incident reviews are scheduled within five business days after resolution and focus on corrective actions, communication quality, and follow-up ownership.

docs/quarterly_plan.md:8: The customer retention KPI is owned jointly by customer success and product growth, but is tracked at the company level in the quarterly scorecard.

# Quarterly Plan

This quarter's KPI focus includes:
- reduce onboarding time
- improve customer retention by 4 points
- cut infrastructure spend by 6 percent

The customer retention KPI is owned jointly by customer success and product growth, but is tracked at the company level in the quarterly scorecard.
docs/incident_roles.md:7: - the customer communications function coordinates external customer updates and status page messaging

# Incident Roles

During a Sev-1 incident:

- the incident commander coordinates the internal response
- the reliability engineering team owns technical mitigation and post-incident review
- the customer communications function coordinates external customer updates and status page messaging

If a customer-facing update is needed, customer communications works with support leadership to align the message.

# Operations Handbook

The incident review process is owned by the reliability engineering team.

Sev-1 incidents require a first response within 15 minutes.

Incident reviews are scheduled within five business days after resolution and focus on corrective actions, communication quality, and follow-up ownership.

# Incident Roles

During a Sev-1 incident:

- the incident commander coordinates the internal response
- the reliability engineering team owns technical mitigation and post-incident review
- the customer communications function coordinates external customer updates and status page messaging

If a customer-facing update is needed, customer communications works with support leadership to align the message.

# Quarterly Plan

This quarter's KPI focus includes:
- reduce onboarding time
- improve customer retention by 4 points
- cut infrastructure spend by 6 percent

The customer retention KPI is owned jointly by customer success and product growth, but is tracked at the company level in the quarterly scorecard.

# Team Directory

- Reliability engineering reports into the platform organization.
- Customer communications reports into customer operations.
- Support leadership partners with customer communications during major incidents.
- Product operations owns weekly operational reporting, but not incident reviews.

# Operations Handbook

The incident review process is owned by the reliability engineering team.

Sev-1 incidents require a first response within 15 minutes.

Incident reviews are scheduled within five business days after resolution and focus on corrective actions, communication quality, and follow-up ownership.

# Quarterly Plan

This quarter's KPI focus includes:
- reduce onboarding time
- improve customer retention by 4 points
- cut infrastructure spend by 6 percent

The customer retention KPI is owned jointly by customer success and product growth, but is tracked at the company level in the quarterly scorecard.

# Incident Roles

During a Sev-1 incident:

- the incident commander coordinates the internal response
- the reliability engineering team owns technical mitigation and post-incident review
- the customer communications function coordinates external customer updates and status page messaging

If a customer-facing update is needed, customer communications works with support leadership to align the message.

payload.result_preview:
# Incident Roles

During a Sev-1 incident:

- the incident commander coordinates the internal response
- the reliability engineering team owns technical mitigation and post-incident review
- the customer communications function coordinates external customer updates and status page messaging

If a customer-facing update is needed, customer communications works with support leadership to align the message.

# Quarterly Plan

This quarter's KPI focus includes:
- reduce onboarding time
- improve customer retention by 4 points
- cut infrastructure spend by 6 percent

The customer retention KPI is owned jointly by customer success and product growth, but is tracked at the company level in the quarterly scorecard.

# Operations Handbook

The incident review process is owned by the reliability engineering team.

Sev-1 incidents require a first response within 15 minutes.

Incident reviews are scheduled within five business days after resolution and focus on corrective actions, communication quality, and follow-up ownership.

# Team Directory

- Reliability engineering reports into the platform organization.
- Customer communications reports into customer operations.
- Support leadership partners with customer communications during major incidents.
- Product operations owns weekly operational reporting, but not incident reviews.
